subject: Product Management
title: After Product-Market Fit
description: Learn After Product-Market Fit in one minute.

hook.text: Finding PMF changes everything. The question shifts from 'does anyone want this?' to 'how do we scale this?'

buildup.text: After PMF, companies hire aggressively, invest in infrastructure, and build go-to-market engines.

discovery.text: But scaling too fast after weak PMF is the #1 startup killer. Many companies mistake early traction for true fit.

twist.text: The transition from finding fit to scaling fit is the most dangerous moment. Premature scaling wastes 70% of startup deaths.

climax.text: The best founders scale gradually, testing whether PMF holds as they expand to new segments and channels.

punchline.text: Find it, then scale it — but make sure you found it first.

quiz.question: What is the biggest danger after finding initial PMF?
options: Scaling too fast before confirming fit is strong enough
Moving too slowly to capture the market
